title: bidens andongensis
intro: Bidens andongensis, also known as Andong marigold, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant is native to Korea and parts of China, and it has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Bidens andongensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Bidens andongensis is typically prepared as an infusion or tea, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs in various herbal preparations, such as tinctures and capsules.
